telegram.disconnectConfirmMessage: The Telegram auto-responder will stop working until you reconnect a bot.
telegram.statsPending: Will appear once the auto-responder starts working
telegram.instructionStep2: Send the /newbot command, choose a name and username for the bot
telegram.instructionStep3: Copy the token it gives you
telegram.instructionStep4: Paste it here and click "Verify & connect"

instagram.connectErrorToast: Couldn't connect Instagram — please try again
instagram.disconnectConfirmMessage: The Instagram auto-responder will stop replying to clients until you reconnect the account.
instagram.statsPending: Will appear once the auto-responder starts working
instagram.instructionStep1: The studio's account must be professional — Business or Creator (Instagram Settings → Account type)
instagram.instructionStep2: Click "Connect Instagram" and sign in as the studio's account
instagram.instructionStep4: You'll be brought back here automatically
